version_description: This is a version C.C. played on aradio interview.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Arthurs Theme Best That You Can Do

content:
[Chords]
(For the verse  Am7 / G6 / F keep the bass line as it is shown in the intro and release first
fret on g-string as heard in the song
In the bridge use the following chords)

[ch]Am7[/ch]* XX02013
[ch]Bm7[/ch]* XX04035
[ch]C[/ch]* XX5557



[tab][Intro]
             [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G6[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G6[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G6[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G6[/ch]
e|-------------------0----|-------------------0----|--------1---------0----|-------------------0----|
B|-----------1-------0----|-----------1-------0----|--------1---------0----|-----------1-------0----|
G|-----------0-------0----|-----------0-------0----|--------2---------0----|-----------0-------0----|
D|-----------2-------0----|-----------2-------0----|--------3---------0----|-----------2-------0----| 
A|--------0--0----0--2----|--------0--0----0--2----|--------3---------2----|--------0--0----0--2----|  x2
E|--0--3--------3----3----|--0--3--------3----3----|--0--3--1--1--0---3----|-0--3---------3----3----|[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
It is the night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G6[/ch]
My body's weak[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]
I'm on the run[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G6[/ch]
No time to sleep[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I've got to ride[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G6[/ch]
Ride like the wind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G6[/ch]
To be free again[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]
And I've got such a long way to go[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
To make it to the border of Mexico[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
So I'll ride like the wind[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Ride like the wind[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I was born the son of a lawless man[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Always spoke my mind with a gun in my hand[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Lived nine lives[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Gunned down ten[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Gonna ride like the wind[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]
And I've got such a long way to go[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
To make it to the border of Mexico[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
So I'll ride like the wind[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Ride like the wind[/tab]
N.C.
Gonna run like the wind

[Verse 3]
[tab]  [ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Accused and tried and told to hang[/tab]

I was nowhere in sight when the church bells rang[/tab]
